name: 3pk Wave Assorted Decorative Basket Cream 5L Narrow 2c - Brightroom™
description:
You'll love storing your sunglasses, shampoo and other essentials in the 3-Pack of Wave Assorted Decorative Baskets from Brightroom™. This set of three baskets come in varying sizes to give you ample space for storing all your essentials. Designed with an open top, the cream baskets feature a wave pattern for an elegantly textured look. Made of plastic, these decorative baskets are compatible with the 13-inch cube storage system.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
